SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-10-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-10-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF ANDREA ELLMAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY ANTHONY ROBINSON (CLAIMS REPRESENTATIVE). ORAL AMENDMENT TO DELETE DBA ANDRONICO'S COMMUNITY MARKETS. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG GAVE DISCLOSURE ABOUT CAMPAIGN CONTRIBUTIONS MADE. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: A. DATT. NOT REPORTED. (D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ELLMAN, ANDREA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFEWAY INC. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $200.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,200.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
